caption: A person wearing a dark grey long-sleeved shirt and a rose-gold watch holds a square, light blue piece of paper over a light-colored wooden surface. To the left, a white card features the text "S YOU LITTLE ltelide Greer" and "You warm my heart" alongside a floral illustration. A black heat gun is introduced into the scene, moving closer to the blue paper. The person holds the left edge of the paper with their thumb and forefinger while the heat gun is pointed toward the center and right side of the square. As the sequence progresses, the nozzle of the heat gun moves across the surface of the blue paper, appearing to apply heat to the material. Small, white, bead-like particles are visible on the surface of the blue square throughout the process.
